title: Tapping for trust in perfect timing
subtitle: A tapping practice for when timing anxiety — rushing in too fast or waiting too long — keeps getting in the way.
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 48 of the MONEY program. The script works with the fear of missing the window and the panic that can make you jump too early or hesitate past the moment.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 48 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you're in the window of a decision — an opportunity is present but the timing feels uncertain and fear of missing it is driving your response.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 48 of the MONEY program. The script addresses the specific anxiety around timing big opportunities — second-guessing a decision, rushing to close a deal out of fear, or hesitating past the right moment.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I've worried about missing the perfect moment, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I've rushed into deals out of fear, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though timing has felt stressful, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** I've doubted my sense of timing.
**Side of eye:** I've jumped too soon or waited too long.
**Under eye:** I've second-guessed good openings.
**Under nose:** I've been afraid of missing out.
**Chin:** I've chased deals out of panic.
**Collarbone:** I want to trust natural timing.
**Under arm:** I know the right moment feels calm.
**Top of head:** I relax about when opportunities arrive.
Reframe to positive (repeat x3)
**Eyebrow:** I trust that perfect timing is on my side.
**Side of eye:** I feel calm and clear when it's right.
**Under eye:** I let doors open easily and in order.
**Under nose:** I move with confidence when I get the signal.
**Chin:** I enjoy how opportunities line up.
**Collarbone:** I trust that nothing meant for me can be missed.
**Under arm:** I allow wealth to arrive at the perfect pace.
**Top of head:** I flow with timing that always works out.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from
Adapted from Day 48 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). EFT tapping developed by Gary Craig in the 1990s.
